base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of wall_cannon — a effect_layer from 1987 contra. Wall-embedded cannon — opens/closes for shooting pattern. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Wall-embedded cannon — opens/closes for shooting pattern
